subject: Request: 15 minutes on hiring priorities
body: Hi Orrin Labs, I noticed your open roles moved from 4 to 6. I also saw a series_b signal where public data was available. If useful, I can share two scoped options aligned to confirmed capacity only. Would you be open to a 15-minute review next week?
